applied-stock-count: Applied the stock of the count %code%
no-movements-to-rebuild-stock: There are no stock movements to rebuild
no-stock-this-product: Cannot add product %referencia% because it does not track stock.
rebuilding-movements-finished: Rebuilding of movements finished with %total% products.
stock-count-line-p: Add lines to this count by typing/scanning a barcode or reference. If the product was already in the list, the quantity increases
stock-rebuild-inconsistency-detected: An inconsistency has been detected in the stock of product %reference% from warehouse %warehouse_code%: the sum of the movements (%sum_movements%) does not match the balance of the last movement (%last_balance%).
wait-stock-movements-rebuild: Stock reconstruction not completed; wait for the stock movements rebuild to finish.
